text-aboutmyself: Hello. For now I am changing my business and want to start a career as a developer. I have average skills html, css, sql and c #. At least familiar with php, pyton. The last 3 years was a private entrepreneur I sold SEO, I know about SEO, I know the approximate needs and problems of entrepreneurs who work with WooCommerce. several polygraphs, I have practical skills in Photoshop and Illustrator. I have been programming since I was a teenager. I have no commercial experience working on real projects. All websites (mostly WordPress, some html, css, php) and desktop programs c #, VS, Unity) were made either 'for fun' or for personal projects. Now I'm learning programming on my own. Ready to learn quickly, work and be part of your her team.
